Methods in emiratesid.ae that throw MiddlewareException
static void UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper.LoadConfiguration()
          Load the configuration file sm.cfg, this function is used with local sm
 

Uses of MiddlewareException in emiratesid.ae.biometrics
 

Methods in emiratesid.ae.biometrics that throw MiddlewareException
 FTP_Template SensorDevice.captureAndConvert(FormatType formatType, FingerIndexType fingerIndexType)
           
 FTP_Image SensorDevice.captureImage(int fingerIndexType)
           
 FTP_Template BiometricFacade.convertImage(FTP_Image Image, int FormatType)
          Convert the fingerprint Image into an ISO/DINV template
 int BiometricFacade.match(FTP_Template Tpl1, FTP_Template Tpl2)
          Perform the Match offcard operation, using the provided templates
 int BiometricFacade.matchOffCard(FTP_Template template)
          Perform the Match offcard operation
 boolean BiometricFacade.matchOnCard(BIT bit, FTP_Template template)
          Perform Match On Card Operation
 void BiometricFacade.readBiometricInfoTemplates()
          Read the two Biometric Information Templates stored on card
 int BiometricFacade.readFingerprints()
          Extracts the two fingerprint templates on the card Use getFirstTemplate and getSecondTemplate methods to get the extracted fingerprints

          Sign the data with the authentication keypair

Methods in emiratesid.ae.publicdata that throw MiddlewareException
 boolean PublicDataFacade.isCardGenuine()
          Check if the current smart card is Genuine UAE card This method authenticate the card with local SAM

          Read card holder public data
 

Uses of MiddlewareException in emiratesid.ae.readersmgt
 

Methods in emiratesid.ae.readersmgt that throw MiddlewareException
 void ReaderManagement.closeContext()
          Close the current established context and release all resources
 void PCSCReader.connect(long Context)
          establish a connection between the toolkit and the inserted smart card
 void PCSCReader.disconnect()
          disconnect the current smart card connection and release its resources
 void ReaderManagement.discoverReaders()
          Discover all PCSC readers, connect to each available card, and extract cards ATR, set the type of the card
 void ReaderManagement.establishContext()
          Establish a context with the operating system Smart Card library, to start using the smart card functions
 void PCSCReader.extractATR()
          extract the ATR from the current connected smart card, use getATR method to retrieve the ATR
 char[] CardInfo.getCardSerialNumber()
          Retrieves Card Serial Number
 char[] CardInfo.getChipSerialNumber()
          Retrieves Chip Serial Number
 char[] CardInfo.getCPLC0101()
          Retrieves CPLC 0101 tag
 char[] CardInfo.getCPLC9F7F()
          Retrieves CPLC 9F7F tag
 char[] CardInfo.getIssuerReferenceNumber()
          Retrieves Issuer Reference Number
 char[] CardInfo.getIssuerSerialNumber()
          Retrieves Issuer Serial Number
 long CardInfo.getMaxFailedMatch()
          Retrieves Maximum Failed Match operations that can be done before the card blocks
 char[] CardInfo.getMOCAlgorithmVersion()
          Retrieves MatchOnCard (MOC) Algorithm Version
 char[] CardInfo.getMOCAppletState()
          Retrieves MatchOnCard (MOC) Applet Status
 char[] CardInfo.getMOCSerialNumber()
          Retrieves MatchOnCard (MOC) Serial Number
 PublicDataFacade PCSCReader.getPublicDataFacade()
          Initialize and retrieve PublicDataFacade object

Methods in emiratesid.ae.sm.client that throw MiddlewareException
 boolean SecureMessagingActions.isCardGenuine(SecureMessagingInterface SMM)
          Check if the current smart card is Genuine UAE card This method authenticate the card with the provided SM module object

          Performing match-on-card operation using the specified SM Module
